title: Opening a Bank Account 银行开户

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: Hello, I would like to open a savings account. I just moved to this city for work.
lines.cn: 你好，我想开一个储蓄账户。我刚搬到这个城市工作。

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.content: Welcome! We would be happy to help. Do you have your ID and proof of address with you?
lines.cn: 欢迎！我们很乐意帮忙。你带身份证和地址证明了吗？

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: Yes, here is my passport and my rental agreement. Is that enough?
lines.cn: 带了，这是我的护照和租房合同。够了吗？

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.content: That is perfect. We offer two types of savings accounts. One has no monthly fee but lower interest. The other has a small fee but higher interest.
lines.cn: 非常完美。我们提供两种储蓄账户。一种没有月费但利率较低，另一种有小额月费但利率较高。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: I think I will go with the no-fee account. I do not have a large balance right now.
lines.cn: 我想选无月费的账户。我目前余额不多。

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.content: Good choice. You can always upgrade later. How much would you like to deposit today?
lines.cn: 好选择。以后随时可以升级。你今天想存多少？

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: I will deposit one thousand dollars. Can I also set up online banking today?
lines.cn: 我存1000美元。我今天还能开通网上银行吗？

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.content: Yes, I can set that up for you right now. You will receive a debit card in the mail within five business days.
lines.cn: 可以，我现在就能帮你开通。你将在五个工作日内收到借记卡。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.content: Great. Is there a mobile app for checking my balance and transferring money?
lines.cn: 太好了。有手机应用可以查余额和转账吗？

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.content: Yes, our app is very easy to use. I will show you how to download it before you leave.
lines.cn: 有的，我们的应用很容易使用。你走之前我会教你下载。
